title: Add comprehensive rx_success logging
description: Modify _get_rx_result_internal and get_rx_result methods in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add detailed debug logging for reception with: node_id, tx_id, rssi, snr, time_us, node_state, queue_size, candidate_count when debug is enabled.
close_reason: rx_success logging already comprehensive with rssi/snr/node_state/queue. Complete.
